message:
test(conformance): add setjmp_ops fixture test with longjmp executor fix

- Update execute_longjmp_case to read val input and apply C11 rule
  (val=0 returns 1)
- Handle corrupted_jmp_buf in hardened mode returning REPAIR_ABORT
- Add setjmp_ops_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case test
